form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, 9th of 14 at this track Mdn-Sw on January 30 over 1220m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Bad Alibi carrying 57kg at $8.50. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Dubai Affair with 56.5kg at $7. On speed and went close last time and can feature again.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, ran last of 9 at this track 3yo Mdn on March 13 over 1200m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Dizz Boogie Time carrying 57kg at $17. Likely to hold the good form and play a major role again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 10th of 13 at Hobart 2yo Mdn-Sw on June 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Daytona Diva carrying 57kg at $26. Returned from break 6th of 9 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Dina Tycoon with 56.5kg at $9. Expect he'll find this too tough.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At very long odds at debut, sat on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 9 at this track 3yo Mdn on March 13 over 1200m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Dizz Boogie Time with 52kg at $51. Second-up second last in a small field at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1400m, slow going 3.5 len behind Dennyson carrying 53.5kg at $26. Blinkers added and can give a sight again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tendency to over-race in the early stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run eased back early on 5th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 3 len behind Genuine Lady with 54kg at $10. Before that 6th of 10 at Devonport Synthetic Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1009m, 5 len behind Just Plain Nuts with 54kg at $14. Has been winding up late and looks hard to hold out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tended to over-race through-out. Raced wide from the 800m.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 10th of 15 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on January 18 over 1100m, slow going 9 len behind Magnolia Sky with 52kg at $31. Returned from break second last of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1200m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Colleen's Crown carrying 54.5kg at $6.50. Will need to improve sharply to be any chance.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Last start 5th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1100m, 4 len behind Life After Love with 58kg at $19. The start before that 4th of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1212m, 2.25 len behind Wild Roses Grow with 53kg at $101. Well-placed this line-up and a big chance with the blinkers added.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages. Raced three- wide without cover throughout.
Near the 1100m eased when racing tightly to the inside of Suze Spritz.
